message:
fix: correct semantic bug and add thread safety

- Rename UptimeSeconds to IdleSinceSeconds in SessionAgentHealth struct
  to accurately reflect what it measures (time since last activity,
  not uptime)
- Fix variable shadowing: rename 'copy' to 'backoffCopy' in
  BackoffManager methods to avoid shadowing builtin
- Add mutex protection to DetectAllErrorsInOutput and AddErrorPattern
  in errors.go for thread-safe access to errorPatterns slice

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
